_meta.title: Chicagoland AO-network consolidation intelligence — who is consolidating, and how we know
_meta.produced_by: Lane-1 Main — targeted AO_network evidence backfill
_meta.scope: Exactly the 71 AO_network-lane rows of consolidation_candidate_manifest_20260621.json: 13 original individual rows + 58 protected-network rows across 6 networks.

consolidation_picture.takeaway: Of the 6 AO-network clusters, 2 are genuine PE-backed branded DSOs (19 watched locations) and 4 are dentist/family-owned multi-location groups with NO MSO/PE layer (39 watched locations). AO reach correctly surfaced all 6 as consolidation candidates; documentary corroboration then split them into 'real corporate' vs 'dentist-entrepreneur multi-branding'.

rules_applied: protected_network_hold=true PRESERVED on all 58 protected rows regardless of evidence strength, until the network is EXPLICITLY released by the Gate Owner.
AO reach alone is NOT proof — each advancing row carries a real documentary URL and/or a durable non-AO artifact (name_chain, shared_ein, shared_parent, shared_website, DOL EBSA M-1).
Rows with no documentary URL and no durable non-AO artifact -> gate_status=undetermined, evidence_quality=insufficient.
pe_backed is orthogonal — set true ONLY on documentary PE; it does NOT determine tier.
No DB writes. No consolidation. IL/Chicagoland only. All verdicts ready_for_validation MAX — never 'final'.
_meta.handoff: Gate Owner merges/revalidates into the next manifest. The 58 protected rows stay protected_network_hold=true until each network is explicitly released.

cross_session_audit.description: The 13 original individual rows were investigated by TWO independent agent passes (per-assigned-batch: cicero1/cicero2/south-4/north-3, AND a comprehensive ind_south second pass over all 13). This block records where they agreed vs diverged. Conservative / primary-source verdicts were KEPT in the deliverable; the dissenting second opinion is preserved verbatim at _ao_backfill_raw_20260621/ind_south_full13_secondpass.json and per-row under individuals[].cross_session_corroboration.
evidence_quality_divergences: THE DENTAL MASTRS OF RAVENSWOOD LLC
gate_attention: Image Dental (Dental Town Chicago, 12 offices/one brand): tier dispute dentist_multi vs branded_dso - gate re-judgment, treat consistently with MetroSmiles.
Monil Shah: own website says 'our one office' (kept true_independent); second pass found possible Riverdale 2nd office (unconfirmed) - verify before any flip.
Braam Dental: watched 60640 row is an FQHC affiliation, NOT a chain office (kept undetermined); real Braam private office is at 60659, out of watched scope.
Dental Masters Ravenswood: tier agreed (dentist_multi, verified); confirm possible relocation to Lincoln Park for the watched 60640 row.

ao:SHAFI_SOHAIL.structure_evidence: Dr. Reem Shafi DMD is Owner/CEO of 'Two Rivers Dental' — dentist-owned multi-location group, ~20 locations across IL and CA. Every member office carries an identical 'Dr. Reem Shafi — CEO, Two Rivers Dental' bio page. Legal operating shell is 'Ashton Dental PC' (AO Sohail S Shafi, Manager) across at least 6 confirmed NPIs (Homer Glen, Chicago 60623, Naperville x2, Elgin, Aurora), all sharing mailing 1730 Park St Ste 106 Naperville 60563. NPI 1629614698 lists DBA 'Integra Dental' and 'Ogden Dental'. Smile Town Dental (Addison) is a sub-part of Ashton Dental PC in NPPES. No PE/MSO/DSO management company found — Dr. Shafi self-describes as direct owner-operator.
ao:SHAFI_SOHAIL.tier_rationale: Verified dentist-owned multi-location group operated by Dr. Reem Shafi DMD (CEO, Two Rivers Dental), ~20 IL/CA locations per university career-portal videos and per-practice website bio pages. Durable non-AO artifact = 'Ashton Dental PC' P.C. name-chain across 6+ Chicagoland NPIs, all AO Sohail S Shafi (Manager), mailing 1730 Park St #106 Naperville. 15+ local brand names under one owner = textbook dentist-owned multi-branding. No PE/MSO/DSO management company. BBB confirms Two Rivers Dental P.C. as professional corporation, Dr. Shafi President. DB 'affiliated_dso: Gentle Dental' on Yorkville is a false positive to clear.

durable_non_ao_artifact.detail: Multiple federal NPI records share legal entity name 'Ashton Dental PC' across 6+ distinct Chicagoland addresses (Homer Glen 1588055941, Chicago 60623 1215699632, Naperville 60540 1174124945, Naperville 1629614698, Elgin, Aurora). NPI 1629614698 lists DBA 'Integra Dental'/'Ogden Dental'. All share mailing 1730 Park St Ste 106 Naperville 60563 and AO Sohail S Shafi (Manager, 630-842-3705). Smile Town Dental Addison is a sub-part of Ashton Dental PC. P.C. name-chain + shared mailing + shared AO = durable non-AO artifact.

ao:SHAFI_SOHAIL.evidence_chain: AO signal: Sohail S Shafi (Manager) is the authorized official across 6+ 'Ashton Dental PC' federal NPIs spanning distinct Chicagoland ZIPs. Documentary corroboration: each member office carries an identical 'Dr. Reem Shafi — CEO, Two Rivers Dental' bio page; Illinois Tech career-portal video names Reem Shafi as Owner/CEO of Two Rivers Dental (~20 IL/CA locations); BBB lists Two Rivers Dental P.C. as a professional corporation, Dr. Shafi President; the 'Ashton Dental PC' legal-name chain shares mailing 1730 Park St Ste 106 Naperville + AO Sohail S Shafi. Conclusion: dentist-owned multi-brand group (Shafi family), NOT a DSO/MSO/PE platform.

owner_operator_identity.clinical_owner: Robert G. Brunetti, DDS MBA (Founder/President, est. 1979; P.C. 1993)

ao:BRUNETTI_ROBERT.structure_evidence: Robert G. Brunetti DDS MBA founded the group in 1979, incorporated as Procare Dental Group, P.C. in 1993; President/CEO. BBB Arlington Heights profile lists internal executive team (Cheryl Crowley DDS CEO, Michael Albano COO), no external management company or PE. Website self-describes 'family-owned.' 10 active locations each operate under a distinct local DBA (Premier Dental Associates – Arlington Heights, Associates in Dentistry – Park Ridge, Central DuPage Dental Group – Wheaton, Grand Dentistry – Gurnee, Lakeside Dentistry – Evanston, Naperbrook Dentistry – Naperville, River North Dental Group – Chicago, Village Square Dentistry – Lake Zurich, Lakehills Dentistry – Crystal Lake, Boone Creek Dentistry – McHenry) unified under Procare PC on procaredentalgroup.com/locations. No PE/MSO/DSO platform found in any registry, PitchBook, or search.
ao:BRUNETTI_ROBERT.tier_rationale: Genuine dentist-owned multi-location group founded by Robert G. Brunetti DDS MBA (1979, P.C. 1993), 10 active IL locations each under a distinct local DBA — classic stealth multi-location structure among dentist-owned groups, NOT a DSO/MSO/PE platform. Website, UIC profile, BBB principals, and NPPES records consistently identify Brunetti as founder/CEO, no external management or PE. Lakeside/Lincoln Park/River North brands confirmed Procare DBAs via NPPES legal name. Cicero (719b01502f151a50) not on current site — only member marked confirmed_at_brand=false.
ao:BRUNETTI_ROBERT.pe_evidence: No PE funding/investors/platform affiliations found. PitchBook stub (354092-41) lists no investors. Website says family-owned. Not in GDN/PESP/Becker's/PitchBook deal databases.

durable_non_ao_artifact.detail: All 10 active locations on procaredentalgroup.com/locations with individual local DBA brand names cross-referencing the Procare umbrella. Multiple EINs (363122551 Arlington Heights, 363825258 Elgin, 452609649 Chicago/Ontario) consistent with multi-entity PC structure under single dentist ownership — durable name-chain artifact independent of the AO.

ao:BRUNETTI_ROBERT.evidence_chain: AO signal: Robert G. Brunetti DDS MBA is AO/CEO across 'Procare Dental Group P.C.' NPIs. Documentary corroboration: procaredentalgroup.com/locations lists 10 offices each under a distinct local DBA (Premier Dental Associates, Lakeside Dentistry, River North Dental Group, etc.); UIC faculty profile + BBB principals confirm Brunetti founder/CEO with internal exec team (Cheryl Crowley DDS CEO, Michael Albano COO) and no external management company; NPPES legal name 'Procare Dental Group P.C.' ties the local DBAs to one PC. Conclusion: dentist-owned multi-location group (Brunetti family), no MSO/PE.

ao:LABINOV_BORIS.structure_evidence: D2 Dental at Oak Street P.C. is a single friendly-PC shell used as the licensed entity across 7+ IL addresses. NPI 1821301102 (D2 Dental of Illinois, P.C.) lists DBA 'Destiny Dental' and mailing address 137 N Oak Park Ave, Suite 200, Oak Park, IL — corporate HQ of L2 Management, the DSO that manages Destiny Dental. Boris Labinov is CFO of L2 Management (non-dentist), co-founder of Destiny Dental with Jim Lucci. D2 Dental of Michigan and Ohio also use 137 N Oak Park Ave. Avesis lists 'D2 Dental of Illinois' and 'D2 Dental of Lansing' as Destiny Dental network providers. Textbook friendly-PC/MSO: single P.C. name across all IL offices + non-dentist CFO as AO + management company (L2 Management) at shared Oak Park HQ.
ao:LABINOV_BORIS.tier_rationale: D2 Dental at Oak Street P.C. is the IL friendly-PC shell for Destiny Dental, a DSO managed by L2 Management (HQ 137 N Oak Park Ave). Confirmed by OpenNPI DBA 'Destiny Dental' on NPI 1821301102 and shared corporate mailing across D2 entities in IL/MI/OH. Boris Labinov is CFO of L2 Management (non-dentist), AO across all 7 P.C. locations = MSO agent structure. PE doubly documented: Dixon Midland (2010 founding) and ProSmile/TriSpan (Sept 2024 acquisition). 3 of 7 members NPI-confirmed; all 7 confirmed via shared P.C. + AO + corporate mailing.
ao:LABINOV_BORIS.pe_evidence: Dixon Midland Company (Chicago PE) co-founded/funded Destiny Dental in 2010. Destiny Dental acquired by ProSmile Holdings LLC on September 4, 2024. ProSmile backed by TriSpan (PE, NY/London). Sources: ProSmile press release, Livingstone Partners tombstone, TriSpan press release, Private Equity Info profile.
